code:
%%{Education_StudentDB}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (Education_ContentCDN)

[Education_ClassroomService] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (Education_LMS_Portal)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (Education_ClassroomService)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (Education_StudentDB)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [Education_GradeSync]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [Education_ContentCDN] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育内容分发网络设计一个Hub同步状态机。核心场景是：当Education_ClassroomService检测到与联邦网络的数据不一致时，如何安全地完成状态同步。起点应该是OUT_OF_SYNC状态，触发条件是Education_LMS_Portal发起的SyncRequested事件。
明白了。我注意到OUT_OF_SYNC需要记录具体的分歧原因——比如CRDT帧过期、缺失贡献数据，或者网络拓扑变化。这些诊断信息应该放在状态旁边的注释里。接下来FETCH_REMOTE状态是从联邦节点拉取最新数据，对吗？
对，FETCH_REMOTE完成后进入MERGE状态，这里要执行CRDT合并函数，确保冲突能确定性解决。然后是VALIDATE状态，需要验证签名和哈希完整性，最后到达SYNCED状态，这时候Education_StudentDB会收到同步确认。
主干流程已经画好了。不过我需要补充异常路径——FETCH_REMOTE可能遇到NetworkTimeout或AuthError，MERGE可能有ConflictUnresolved，VALIDATE可能出现HashMismatch或SignatureInvalid。这些都应该汇聚到FAILED状态，然后进入RETRY循环。
很好。还需要考虑运维场景：SYNCED之后可能因为PeriodicSync或参数变更回到OUT_OF_SYNC；另外如果Hub离线或延迟过高，应该进入DEGRADED降级状态，最终需要上报到Education_ContentCDN的运维团队。
确认一下：DEGRADED状态的出口是EscalatedToOps，指向Education_ContentCDN，而不是回到同步流程。SYNCED的另一个出口是Education_GradeSync，表示同步完成后触发成绩同步服务。这两个外部连接我都加上了。
等等，MERGE状态的注释需要调整——你写的是"合并完成"，但实际上这里要强调"apply CRDT merge function"和"ensure convergence"，这是关键的设计意图。另外VALIDATE的签名验证要明确指出是"verify signatures from remote hubs"。
已修正注释内容。最后我为所有核心状态应用了统一的视觉样式——橙色填充加粗边框，这样OUT_OF_SYNC、FETCH_REMOTE、MERGE、VALIDATE、SYNCED、FAILED、RETRY和DEGRADED在图上一眼就能区分出来。状态机标题定为SM-06.01 Hub Sync State (Education_ContentCDN)。
